title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a neighbour's dog.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Is that dog still barking at night? || Man: Not as much. The owner bought it some toys, which helped a bit. || Woman: That's good. || Man: Yes, but [8]when people walk past the garden, it still barks loudly for several minutes[/8]. || Woman: Have you spoken to the owner? || Man: Not yet. She seems kind, so I'll mention it if it continues. || Woman: I can see why. || Man: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Is that dog still barking at night?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not as much. The owner bought it some toys, which helped a bit.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's good.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but when people walk past the garden, it still barks loudly for several minutes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you spoken to the owner?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. She seems kind, so I'll mention it if it continues.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I can see why.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, it wasn't what I expected, but I learnt something useful.

questions.question: What problem does the man still have with the dog?

options.A: It makes noise when people pass.

questions.explanation: He says the dog barks loudly when people walk past the garden.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman telling a friend about a new coat.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Is that a new coat? It looks warm. || Woman: Yes, I bought it yesterday. It wasn't cheap, but I had a voucher. || Man: Did you get it online? || Woman: No, in town. [9]I nearly chose the red one because it looked stylish, but this dark blue one will be easier to wear with my work clothes[/9]. || Man: Good choice. || Woman: I hope so. I needed something practical. || Man: Good idea. || Woman: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Is that a new coat? It looks warm.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, I bought it yesterday. It wasn't cheap, but I had a voucher.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you get it online?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, in town. I nearly chose the red one because it looked stylish, but this dark blue one will be easier to wear with my work clothes.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good choice.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I hope so. I needed something practical.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I'll do that, and then I won't have to worry about it again.

questions.question: Why did the woman choose the dark blue coat?

options.A: It was cheaper than the red one.
options.B: It matches more of her clothes.
options.C: It was warmer than the others.

questions.explanation: She says the dark blue coat will be easier to wear with her work clothes.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a dance class.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you coming back to dance class next week? || Man: I think so. I was nervous before the first lesson because I didn't know anyone. || Woman: Everyone seemed friendly. || Man: They were. [10]The difficult part was remembering the steps when the music got faster[/10]. || Woman: That will improve with practice. || Man: I hope so. I enjoyed it more than going to the gym. || Woman: That makes sense. || Man: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you coming back to dance class next week?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I think so. I was nervous before the first lesson because I didn't know anyone.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Everyone seemed friendly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: They were. The difficult part was remembering the steps when the music got faster.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That will improve with practice.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. I enjoyed it more than going to the gym.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly, and I feel much happier about it now.

questions.question: What did the man find difficult in the dance class?
questions.explanation: He says remembering the steps became difficult when the music got faster.

extracts.context: You will hear a man talking to a colleague about lunch at work.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you going to the sandwich shop again? || Man: Not today. The food's nice, but the queue is always long. || Woman: There's a new salad bar downstairs. || Man: I tried it yesterday. [11]It's healthy, but the portions are tiny. I was hungry again by three o'clock[/11]. || Woman: That's not useful. || Man: Exactly. I might bring something from home tomorrow. || Woman: I'm sure that will help. || Man: I hope so. It's better to sort it out early. || Woman: I understand. || Man: Thanks.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you going to the sandwich shop again?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not today. The food's nice, but the queue is always long.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: There's a new salad bar downstairs.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I tried it yesterday. It's healthy, but the portions are tiny. I was hungry again by three o'clock.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's not useful.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. I might bring something from home tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I'm sure that will help.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. It's better to sort it out early.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I understand.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks.

questions.question: What does the man say about the salad bar?
questions.explanation: He says the portions are tiny and he was hungry again later.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a television series.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you watch the new detective series? || Woman: Yes, the first episode. The story was a bit slow at first. || Man: I thought the ending was clever. || Woman: [12]Me too. I didn't expect the quiet neighbour to be involved, so that surprise made me want to watch the next episode[/12]. || Man: The acting was good as well. || Woman: It was, especially the main detective. || Man: That sounds fair. || Woman: Yes, and I think everyone will understand the situation.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you watch the new detective series?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, the first episode. The story was a bit slow at first.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I thought the ending was clever.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Me too. I didn't expect the quiet neighbour to be involved, so that surprise made me want to watch the next episode.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: The acting was good as well.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It was, especially the main detective.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds fair.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, and I think everyone will understand the situation.

questions.question: What did the woman like about the episode?
questions.explanation: She says the surprise involving the neighbour made her want to watch the next episode.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman telling a friend about helping at a library.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How's your volunteer work at the library? || Woman: I like it. At first I thought I'd only put books back on shelves, but I do more than that. || Man: Such as? || Woman: [13]On Saturday I helped some older people use the computers to find books and print forms[/13]. || Man: That sounds useful. || Woman: It is. I feel I'm actually helping people, not just tidying shelves. || Man: I hadn't thought of that. || Woman: Neither had I at first, but now it seems obvious.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How's your volunteer work at the library?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I like it. At first I thought I'd only put books back on shelves, but I do more than that.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Such as?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: On Saturday I helped some older people use the computers to find books and print forms.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds useful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It is. I feel I'm actually helping people, not just tidying shelves.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hadn't thought of that.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Neither had I at first, but now it seems obvious.

questions.question: What did the woman do at the library on Saturday?
questions.explanation: She says she helped older people use computers.
